BatchAddChannelRoleToAccessors.description: Grants permission to add a role to users and groups in a private re:Post channel in your account

BatchAddRole.description: Grants permission to add a role to users and groups in a private re:Post in your account

BatchRemoveChannelRoleFromAccessors.description: Grants permission to remove a role from users and groups in a private re:Post channel in your account

BatchRemoveRole.description: Grants permission to remove a role from users and groups in a private re:Post in your account

CreateChannel.description: Grants permission to create a new channel in private re:Post in your account

CreateSpace.description: Grants permission to create a new private re:Post in your account

DeleteSpace.description: Grants permission to delete a private re:Post from your account

DeregisterAdmin.description: Grants permission to remove an administrator to a private re:Post in your account

GetChannel.description: Grants permission to get the description for a channel in private re:Post in your account

GetSpace.description: Grants permission to get the description for a private re:Post in your account

ListChannels.description: Grants permission to list all channels in a private re:Post in your account

ListSpaces.description: Grants permission to list all private re:Posts in your account

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags associated with a resource

RegisterAdmin.description: Grants permission to add an administrator to a private re:Post in your account

SendInvites.description: Grants permission to send invites to users of a private re:Post in your account

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateChannel.description: Grants permission to update a channel in private re:Post in your account

UpdateSpace.description: Grants permission to update a private re:Post in your account

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tag keys in the request
